summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.mediation.model; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Hotspot { private String id; private String name; private String type; // e.g., "entry_point", "core_module", "bottleneck", "critical_query" private String description; private double significance; private List<String> evidence = new ArrayList<>(); private List<String> relatedArtifacts = new ArrayList<>(); public Hotspot() {} public Hotspot(String id, String name, String type) { this.id = id; this.name = name; this.type = type; } public String getId() { return id; } public void setId(String id) { this.id = id; } public String getName() { return name; }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
